ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patient (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (e.g., Male, Female, Both) */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the patient */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the patient's condition */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_medical_condition FOREIGN KEY ("medical_condition") REFERENCES medical_conditions ("condition_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "biospecimens" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biospecimen */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the biospecimen belongs to */,
  "biospecimen_type" TEXT /* Type of biospecimen (e.g., Blood, Tissue) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the biospecimen was collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the biospecimen */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Site where the sample was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample */,
  "collected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biospecimens_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biomarkers" (
  "biomarker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biomarker */,
  "biomarker_name" TEXT /* Name of the biomarker */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the biomarker */,
  "normal_range" TEXT /* Normal range for the biomarker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the biomarker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the biomarker record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the biomarker record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biomarker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the reference */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the reference was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the detail belongs to */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed notes and metadata for the measurement */,
  "storage_temperature" TEXT /* Storage temperature of the sample */,
  "storage_duration" TEXT /* Storage duration of the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_details_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the data belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of ages for the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age group record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age group record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sex record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sex record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medical condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)
